subhead: Known for its favorable tax system, Zug is attracting rich individuals looking for security and stability. The trend is also spreading to other regions of the country.

title: The summer dress theory
subhead: Lightweight and often floral, it fills the streets of France as soon as temperatures rise. But what if the sundress, archetype of so-called 'feminine' clothing, was also a political statement?

title: Macron turns to renowned writers to chronicle his final year in office
subhead: Since summer 2025, the Elysée has invited prominent authors to accompany the French president and recount in the press the final key events of his term, tempting them with privileged access.

title: Marjane Satrapi's comic strips for Le Monde, 20 years ago
subhead: Best known for her masterpiece 'Persepolis,' the French-Iranian graphic novelist and filmmaker, who died on June 4, published comic strips in issues of Le Monde's magazine.

title: Violence amid PSG celebrations was not gang-driven, but acts by 'varied profiles'
subhead: Paris Saint-Germain's Champions League victory was followed by unrest in the French capital. The arrests and trials that followed present a different picture from the one hastily drawn by some politicians. With the World Cup underway, local authorities remain vigilant.
